page_2.page_notes: Page 2 contains 6 battles, all attacker [TFO]Far Seer, all DEFEAT (Far Seer wiped, all troops lightly injured/injured, 0 survivors on own side). Battles 1-4 vs Lv. 12 Musk Ox at X:978 Y:1051 (own X:976 Y:1051); battles 5-6 vs Lv. 13 Giant Tapir at X:967 Y:1035 (own X:966 Y:1036). Strips overlap: 12:38:34 appears in strips 1-2, 12:40:55 in strips 2-3, 12:51:45 in strips 3-4 - each reported once, deduped by timestamp. Note on Stat Bonuses colors: contrary to the briefing, the own-side (left) column is rendered in RED (+12.1/+10.1/+10.0/+10.0) and the beast (right) column in GREEN (flat +14.4% for Musk Ox battles, +18.5% for Giant Tapir battles); assignment here is by column position (left = Far Seer), consistent with the beast having the same value on all 12 rows. Battles at 12:40:18 and 12:40:55 have identical armies and identical outcomes - independently verified, not double-reported. No Skill Details panels, no skill tooltips, and no Hero Overall Stats cards appear anywhere on this page; battle 1 includes a Hero Comparison panel with all hero slots empty (no heroes on either side).

No Hero Overall Stats card on this page. Expiry line under battle 1: 'Expires in 2026-07-17 12:36:22'.

page_4.page_notes: Page 4 contains three battles by [TFO]Far Seer (X:976 Y:1051): 12:39:07 DEFEAT vs Lv. 12 Musk Ox, 12:41:39 VICTORY vs Lv. 12 Musk Ox, 12:42:45 DEFEAT vs Lv. 13 Giant Tapir. Strips overlap: strip 1/2 cover battle 1 and its Battle Details, strip 2/3 cover battle 2, strip 3/4 cover battle 3; each battle reported once by timestamp. One skill tooltip appears (Rallying Beat Lv. 2, +10% all Troops Attack) attached to battle 1's Skill Details. Seo-yoon (Lv. 20) is the only hero in all three battles; the adjacent slot reads 'Marksman Hero: Vacant' and her own slot label is cropped in every view. No 'Hero Overall Stats' card appears on this page. Green own-side stat bonuses are identical across all three battles; the beast column is +14.4% for both Musk Ox fights and +18.5% for the Giant Tapir fight.
